Notes:
1. A multiplier of 2.0 was used to convert civilian production rates to military production rates in this figure.
No further adjustment required for military production.
2. The masonry estimates are based on the following conditions:
a. All joints are 3/8 inch.
b. Units laid in running bond or stack bond.
c. All mortar is mixed by machine.
3. All special blocks that require field cutting shall be ordered as full size blocks.
